title: cyperus haspan
intro: Cyperus haspan, also known as the small-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyperus haspan include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Cyperus haspan can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
